creator: isetro@sevicron.com
text:
I am having the same problem as in bug 26244 where burncd fails to eject the cd giving the acd0: PREVENT_ALLOW - ILLEGAL REQUEST asc=64 ascq=00 error=04 error.  After fixating the light on my burner continues to blink for a couple minutes and I can eventually eject the cd using cdcontrol -f /dev/acd0c eject.  I am using an HP8100 4x burner.
As you can see, I built world only a few days ago...

How-To-Repeat: burncd -f /dev/acd0c -s 4 -e data tmp.iso fixate
